anti_spillover_constraints: DO NOT implement batch execution across multiple symbols — that is T14 scope.
DO NOT implement exit-rule specialization (stop-loss, take-profit, trailing stops) — that is T15 scope.
DO NOT implement any reporting, chart generation, or artifact serialization — that is T16 scope.
DO NOT modify src/tw_quant/schema/models.py — all required dataclasses already exist and must be used as-is.
DO NOT alter or delete Protocol stubs in src/tw_quant/backtest/interfaces.py.
DO NOT implement cross-symbol portfolio aggregation or correlation logic.
DO NOT introduce external dependencies beyond the existing project environment.
DO NOT add equity-curve storage or FeatureFrameRef population — leave equity_curve_ref as None.
DO NOT implement slippage models, partial fills, or order-book simulation.
acceptance_criteria: SimpleExecutionModel implements ExecutionModel Protocol: fills at close price, None bar → no fill, fee=0.0.
InMemoryPortfolioBook implements PortfolioBook Protocol: apply_fills updates cash and holdings; snapshot returns PortfolioSnapshot with nav = cash + holdings*prices; initial_cash configurable.
SymbolBacktestEngine implements BacktestEngine Protocol: run(start, end) iterates over dates inclusive, strict event sequence, returns BacktestResult with final_nav, total_return, num_trades.
SymbolBacktestEngine accepts symbol, data_provider, execution_model, portfolio_book, signal_source, run_id.
Per-symbol boundary: single symbol per engine instance, no cross-symbol aggregation.
Event sequence strictly: signal_source → execute → apply_fills → snapshot, no skip or reorder.
Unit tests in tests/test_tw_quant_backtest_engine.py: 5 tests covering AC#9a, AC#9b, AC#9c.
No batch, exit-rule, or reporting imports.
summary: T13 scopes the concrete implementation of the three Protocol stubs: SimpleExecutionModel, InMemoryPortfolioBook, SymbolBacktestEngine. All batch, exit-rule, and reporting concerns explicitly excluded.
